value.found_quote: For private per-project preferences that shouldn't be checked into version control, create a `CLAUDE.local.md` at the project root. It loads alongside `CLAUDE.md` and is treated the same way. Add `CLAUDE.local.md` to your `.gitignore` so it isn't committed
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes CLAUDE.local.md as a file for private per-project preferences that loads alongside CLAUDE.md and should be added to .gitignore, matching the claim exactly.
